Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process is Idea Generation IG then Design Draft DD then Technical Feasibility Check TFC then Cost Evaluation CE then Prototype Creation PC then Laboratory Testing LT then User Testing UT then Approval Gate AG then Marketing Plan MP then Final Launch FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Each product idea goes through a series of steps before it is finally launched so each trace contains all these activities in order

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can set existence for IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL and exactly one for all of them and init for IG

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: For binary relations like response precedence and succession the DECLARE rules typically involve pairs of activities so I will interpret the keys as tuples of source and target activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Since the process is likely a linear sequence we can define DECLARE constraints that reflect this strict sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For a strict sequence we can use succession for consecutive pairs IG DD DD TFC TFC CE CE PC PC LT LT UT UT AG AG MP MP FL

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Support 1 0 and confidence 1 0 can be assigned because the intended model describes rules that always hold in this scenario

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: The remaining categories like absence noncoexistence nonsuccession and nonchainsuccession can reasonably be left empty

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: I considered including many additional valid rules like all possible response and precedence pairs but chose a simpler minimal representation centered on the direct sequence
